latin: Hora nona noctis, mihi dixi: 'unum solum capitulum spectabo.' hora secunda matutina, decem capitula spectaveram. 'unum plus,' iterum dixi. sol oriebatur cum tandem dormivi.

questions.prompt: How many episodes did the narrator plan to watch?
When did the narrator finally fall asleep?

translation: At nine at night, I said to myself: 'I will watch just one episode.' At two in the morning, I had watched ten episodes. 'One more,' I said again. The sun was rising when I finally fell asleep.
